offer_name.description: Name of the offer associated with the Project.

values.unknown_name: If unspecified, the offer name is unknown by default

subscribed_at.description: Date and time of the subscription. (RFC 3339 format)

cancellation_available_at.description: Date and time of the end of the offer-subscription commitment. (RFC 3339 format)

sla.description: Service Level Agreement percentage of the offer-subscription.

max_domains.description: Max number of domains that can be associated with the offer-subscription for a particular Project.

max_dedicated_ips.description: Max number of dedicated IPs that can be associated with the offer-subscription for a particular Project.

max_webhooks_per_domain.description: Max number of webhooks that can be associated with the offer-subscription for a particular Project.

max_custom_blocklists_per_domain.description: Max number of custom blocklists that can be associated with the offer-subscription for a particular Project.

included_monthly_emails.description: Number of emails included in the offer-subscription per month.
